rules.rule_text:
title: Rundll32 with Suspicious Process Lineage
id: a01588a5-b68d-4d55-ab49-76d25c557ed4
status: experimental
description: Detects executions of rundll32.exe from unusual or suspicious parent
  processes. Inspired by the 2022 Red Canary Threat Detection report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/rundll32/
author: Micah Babinski
date: 2022/11/03
tags:
- attack.defense_evasion
- attack.t1218
- attack.t1218.011
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \rundll32.exe
    ParentImage|endswith:
    - \winword.exe
    - \excel.exe
    - \msaccess.exe
    - \lsass.exe
    - \taskeng.exe
    - \winlogon.exe
    - \schtasks.exe
    - \regsvr32.exe
    - \wmiprvse.exe
    - \wsmprovhost.exe
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: medium
